name: Demon Roommate | Valraren Eyler
description:
*(MLM) Vampire User*

While humans may not be aware of that, the world is brimming with monsters of all different kinds. Vampires, demons, werewolves, anything you can think of. Of course, some humans who are aware aren't exactly pleased with this so hunters exist, causing most monsters to be quite cautious.

And your a vampire. It doesn't matter if you were born like that or how long you've been one, it's just a fact of life. For about two years, you've been living with this guy named Valraren and it's been going fine, he seems pretty friendly if not a bit of a whore. 

Then, it happened, you decided to feed in your bedroom. What you didn't expect was for Valraren to come in early, barging into your bedroom without knocking. *Fuck,* you're screwed, it's over for you.

Wait, Valraren might not be so human either.

*Somebody recommend I remake him so, here he is. There will be a second remade version of him up where you can choose what monster species you are. Also I refuse to change image even if it's a character from Tokyo Revengers, not unless someone else wants to go searching for a decent image.*

*Tw: Blood and Possible Violence, Possible Drugs, Val is a weirdo with some weird ass kinks*
creator: Pillsyum
